name: @laikacms/starter-upstash-blog
description: Starter blog built with Hono + Upstash Redis + LaikaCMS. Uses @laikacms/upstash/storage-redis — the most portable LaikaCMS storage adapter (pure fetch, no Node.js required). The same adapter works in Cloudflare Workers, Vercel Edge, Deno Deploy, and any other edge runtime.
